scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development nodemon --watch server --watch functions --ext js,json --exec node server/index.js
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev --env-file .env
scripts.build: vite build && mkdir -p dist/assets/logo && cp -R public/assets/logo/. dist/assets/logo/ && cp public/_routes.json dist/_routes.json
